title: juncus arcticus subsp. euarcticus
intro: Juncus arcticus subsp. euarcticus, also known as Arctic rush, is a subspecies of rush plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or infusion, and its roots can be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
